message:
feat: Add Metal GPU infrastructure for batch vector search

- Add vector_search.metal with GPU kernels:
  - cosine_similarity_batch
  - dot_product_batch
  - l2_distance_batch
- Add metal_backend.m Objective-C wrapper for Metal API
- Add metal_gpu.zig with Zig bindings to Metal C API
- Update metal.zig with GPU batch functions (falls back to CPU)
- Add metal-shaders build step (requires Xcode)

Current performance (Accelerate vDSP):
- Dot product: 34 ns/op
- Cosine sim: 81 ns/op
- Batch: 14M vectors/sec

Note: Metal GPU requires Xcode for shader compilation.
Command Line Tools alone are not sufficient.
